reason:
Node 1.1.5 has NO dependencies listed, yet it critically relies on two external results:

(1) The face characterization: 'psi in F_{S(A)}(phi) iff psi <= lambda*phi for some lambda > 0.' This is the key input to the surjectivity argument and must be either a dependency on a sibling/child node or on an external.

(2) The Radon-Nikodym theorem for states (definition Radon_Nikodym_for_states or external Takesaki/Alfsen-Shultz).

Both of these are substantive mathematical results that the proof of 1.1.5 depends on. The node should declare these as formal dependencies. Without them, the proof graph is incomplete: the node appears self-contained when it is not.

SUGGESTED FIX: (a) Create a lemma node for the face characterization equivalence and add it as a dependency of 1.1.5 (and also of 1.1.3, which uses the reverse direction). (b) Add either an external reference or a dependency on a node establishing the Radon-Nikodym theorem for states in the generality needed (general *-algebras).
